title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Development Council Resolution, Dated June 26, 2020, Resolution No. 2020-04, Resolution Approving the 20% Municipal Development Fund of the Municipality of Los Baños Amounting to Fifty-four Million Three Hundred Twenty-six Thousand Two Hundred Eighty-five Pesos and 40/100 (PHP 54,326,285.40) for Fy 2021. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 06/29/2020)
